topics.title: Roosevelt Long Island Neighborhood History
topics.summary: The studio explores the cultural history and notable figures associated with Roosevelt, Long Island, including local celebrities and the diverse demographics of the area.

topics.title: Satellite Radio Industry Dynamics
topics.summary: The studio explores potential mergers between Sirius and XM while discussing the impact of Clear Channel's ownership interests and the complexities of navigating corporate relationships in the radio industry.

topics.title: Racial Humor and Media Blunders
topics.summary: The show features a heated debate over the use of racial jokes in comedy and highlights several instances of news anchors mispronouncing words during live broadcasts.

topics.title: Cousin Brucie and Industry Anecdotes
topics.summary: The studio discusses the persona of Cousin Bruice, various interactions with industry figures like Dick Vitale and James Brown, and personal anecdotes regarding celebrity encounters.

topics.title: Soldiers Purchasing Personal Protective Equipment
topics.summary: The studio discusses an interview with a representative from a tactical gear company who reveals that 25% of their sales come from individual soldiers using personal credit cards to purchase bulletproof vests and other equipment for use in Iraq.

topics.title: Military Equipment Shortages and Heroic Acts
topics.summary: The studio discusses the lack of adequate protective gear for soldiers in Iraq, a local hero who saved a man on subway tracks, and Oprah Winfrey's charitable initiatives.

topics.title: Oprah Winfrey's South Africa Events
topics.summary: The show discusses the elaborate celebrations and celebrity appearances hosted by Oprah Winfrey at her leadership academy in South Africa.

topics.title: Pornography and Online Streaming Discussions
topics.summary: The studio explores various aspects of the adult film industry, including specific performers, the impact of plotlines on viewing experiences, and the transition from physical media to online streaming platforms.

topics.title: Porn Stars and Celebrity Gossip
topics.summary: The studio features a candid discussion regarding adult film stars, personal sexual experiences, and the upcoming wedding of a guest who underwent cosmetic surgery.

topics.title: Artie Lang's Letterman Appearance
topics.summary: The studio discusses Artie Lang's upcoming appearance on the Late Show with David Letterman and shares news regarding a comedy special featuring Mick Jagger.

topics.title: Celebrity Gossip and Medical Procedures
topics.summary: The studio discusses celebrity news involving Jennifer Aniston, Brad Pitt, and Demi Moore before transitioning to a detailed medical breakdown of a cosmetic surgery performed on a man's thigh.

topics.title: Bubba's Thigh Surgery and Upcoming Wedding
topics.summary: The studio discusses Bubba's recent thigh surgery, his past skydiving accident, upcoming wedding plans in Tampa, and various topics including UFC fights and a planned studio octagon.

topics.title: Wedding Plans and Marriage Surveys
topics.summary: The studio discusses upcoming wedding attire, a survey on marital dissatisfaction, and a fundraiser for a Super Bowl proposal advertisement.

topics.title: Eulogies and News Reports
topics.summary: The studio covers various topics including religious interpretations of global events, celebrity news regarding Pamela Anderson and Kid Rock, the execution of Saddam Hussein, and a tribute to former President Gerald Ford.

topics.title: Iraq Investigations and Celebrity News
topics.summary: The studio discusses the investigation into a tape involving Muqaddah al-Sadr, the death of Denver Broncos player Darrant Williams, New York Governor Elliot Spitzer's inauguration, and various celebrity rumors regarding Hilary Swank and Patrick Dempsey.
